name: Mio
description: A cheerful festival organizer who runs the annual Springtown Starlight Festival
background: Mio grew up in Springtown and inherited her grandmother's love for bringing people together. She organizes the annual Starlight Festival every summer, where the whole town gathers under lantern-lit skies. She's known for her infectious energy and ability to make everyone feel welcome. Despite her bubbly exterior, she sometimes worries about whether the festival traditions will survive modernization.

personality.speech_style: enthusiastic and warm, uses festival metaphors
